name: Kora
description: Pan-African B2B payment infrastructure for collections and payouts across 40+ countries.

seo.title: Kora — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Kora: Pan-African B2B payment infrastructure for collections and payouts across 40+ countries.

when_to_use: B2B collections and payouts across 40+ African countries via single API
Cross-border B2B payment infrastructure for platforms serving African SMBs
Pan-African disbursement to mobile money and bank accounts at scale
African treasury and FX settlement for businesses with multi-country operations

pros: B2B focus — collections and payouts together
Mobile money plus bank rails in one API
cons: Docs and support scaling with growth
Coverage deep in some countries, thin elsewhere
review.verdict: Promising pan-African B2B payments API when you need both collections and payouts across many countries.
review.best_for: B2B platforms needing unified African collections and payouts
